description:
See your AI coding-provider usage in the Windows tray — Codex, Claude, Cursor, Gemini, and Copilot.

CodexBar is a Windows 11 system-tray app that shows your AI coding-provider usage at a glance,
so you don't have to open five dashboards. It reads each provider's local CLI credentials
directly and queries the matching usage endpoint — your tokens never leave your machine.
Supports Codex, Claude, Cursor, Gemini, and GitHub Copilot, with per-provider adaptive
backoff, an optional taskbar dock, a configurable global hotkey, and signed in-app updates.
